data.current_description: Retrieves all projects within the account.

message: Operation 'getQuery' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary conflates query retrieval with recommendations. Description lacks clarity about required inputs (query ID), what is actually returned, and the dependency on query processing completion. Improved version clarifies the operation retrieves results from an existing query and explains the processing dependency for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get content recommendations for a query
data.current_description: Retrieves content recommendations for a query. Processing typically takes approximately 60 seconds after creation.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve content analysis results and recommendations
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the completed content analysis results and recommendations for a previously created query. Requires the query ID as input. Returns content recommendations including SEO metrics, keyword analysis, and optimization suggestions. Note: Query must be fully processed (typically 60 seconds after creation) before results are available.
data.reasoning: Original summary conflates query retrieval with recommendations. Description lacks clarity about required inputs (query ID), what is actually returned, and the dependency on query processing completion. Improved version clarifies the operation retrieves results from an existing query and explains the processing dependency for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_summary: Get saved content for a query
data.current_description: Retrieves the last saved content revision for a query.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the last saved content revision for a specified query. Requires query ID as input. data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about required inputs and what the response contains. Added information about required query ID parameter, response structure including content and metadata, and edge case handling to improve AI agent understanding of when this operation is applicable.

message: Operation 'evaluateContent' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions it doesn't save but lacks detail about what is returned and the use case. Added information about return value (scores and recommendations), clarified no persistence occurs, and explained the preview use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus importContent.

data.current_description: Evaluates the content score without saving a new revision. Same parameters as import-content but does not persist changes.
data.description_suggestion: Evaluates the content score without saving a new revision. Accepts the same parameters as import-content (HTML content or URL). Returns content score metrics and optimization recommendations. No revision is created and no changes are persisted to the project. Useful for previewing scores before committing changes.
data.reasoning: Description mentions it doesn't save but lacks detail about what is returned and the use case. Added information about return value (scores and recommendations), clarified no persistence occurs, and explained the preview use case to help AI agents understand when to use this operation versus importContent.
